chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-763 of 2024 Qadir Khan Mandokhail Versus Chief Election Commission & others Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to maintainability of petition. Dated: 13.08.2024 Mr. Akhlaq Khan Mandokhail for petitioner. -.-.- Learned counsel is instructed by the petitioner not to press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with pending applications. Chief Justice Judge
